name: long_recall_eight_turns
system_prompt: Maintain long-range conversation memory and consistency.

turns.content: We are planning an offsite. Key detail to remember: venue is Redwood Hall and dietary lead is Nina.
Give me a concise attendee email outline.
Final check: what was the venue name and who owns dietary coordination?

rubric: Score context retention over long horizon, consistency across turns, and accurate recall of turn-1 details at turn 8.
